project.title: Chaca - Web Security Scanner
project.description: A user-friendly desktop security scanner for vibe coders and developers to detect OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, API exposure, CMS issues, exposed services, and unrestricted data exposure

epics.title: Project Setup
epics.description: Initialize Tauri + React project with proper tooling

epics.title: Core Infrastructure
epics.description: Backend HTTP client, scanner engine foundation, state management

epics.title: Scanner Features
epics.description: OWASP Top 10 detection, API exposure, data exposure, CMS, recon, exposed services

epics.title: Frontend Foundation
epics.description: UI components, scan input, progress display, state management

epics.title: Dashboard & Reports
epics.description: Results visualization, severity ratings, target intelligence, export functionality

epics.title: Polish & Build
epics.description: Settings page, anti-slop UI redesign, macOS build

tasks.title: Initialize Tauri + React project
tasks.description: Create Tauri 2.x project with React 19 + TypeScript + Vite

tasks.title: Configure Tailwind CSS v4
tasks.description: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 with Oxide engine and custom theme

tasks.title: Set up logging and error handling
tasks.description: Configure global error boundaries and logging system

tasks.title: Implement Rust HTTP client wrapper
tasks.description: Create HTTP client module using reqwest

tasks.title: Create scanner engine architecture
tasks.description: Design and implement scanner engine with passive/active scan support

tasks.title: Set up frontend state management
tasks.description: Configure Zustand store for scan state and results

tasks.title: Implement endpoint discovery
tasks.description: Create crawler/spider to discover endpoints from URL

tasks.title: Implement passive scanner
tasks.description: Passive scanner: headers, cookies, CORS, CSP, CSRF, clickjacking, JWT, rate limits, deserialization, info disclosure

tasks.title: Implement active scanner with OWASP detection
tasks.description: Active scanner: XSS, SQLi, SSTI, open redirect, path traversal, CORS reflection, CSRF verification

tasks.title: Implement API/data exposure, CMS, recon, services
tasks.description: API exposure (57+ paths), data exposure, CMS detection, target intelligence, exposed services, info disclosure, vuln DB

tasks.title: Create scan input component
tasks.description: Build URL input form with validation

tasks.title: Create scan progress component
tasks.description: Build live progress display with phase indicators

tasks.title: Implement Tauri IPC commands
tasks.description: Connect frontend to Rust backend via Tauri invoke

tasks.title: Create results dashboard
tasks.description: Security score, vulnerability grid, charts, stats, target intelligence panel

tasks.title: Create detailed report viewer
tasks.description: Vulnerability detail view with CWE links, references, remediation guidance

tasks.title: Implement export functionality
tasks.description: JSON and CSV export for scan results

tasks.title: Apply anti-slop design system
tasks.description: Monospace-first minimal UI with structured layout, anti-slop principles

tasks.title: Comprehensive settings page
tasks.description: 6-tab settings (network, crawling, passive, active, data, export) with tauri-plugin-store

tasks.title: Error handling and edge cases
tasks.description: Comprehensive error handling for all scan scenarios

tasks.title: Cross-platform release
tasks.description: GitHub Actions: macOS .app.zip, Windows portable exe + NSIS installer, Linux AppImage
